data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for conditional visibility, specifically the ability to show fields only if a certain condition (X) is true. However, the linked use case does not provide any evidence or examples of how conditional visibility is implemented or validated, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage. The absence of this critical functionality in the provided evidence leads to the conclusion that the requirement is not satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of conditional visibility implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
